{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":226884,"duration_api_ms":218682,"num_turns":50,"result":"Phase 5 완료. 구현 요약:

1. **SearchViewModel.swift** — 검색 로직 (과거 1년~미래 1년 범위, 제목 필터링, 날짜별 그룹핑) + SearchHistory CRUD (중복 시 searchedAt 업데이트, 최대 20개)
2. **SearchView.swift** — `.searchable` 연동, debounce 300ms, 최근 검색 기록 UI (탭→검색, ✕→삭제), 검색 결과 날짜별 섹션, 항목 탭→EventFormView 수정 모드
3. **SettingsView.swift** — 캘린더/리마인더 목록 토글, CalendarSelection upsert, 첫 실행 시 기본 활성화
4. **EventKitService** — `enabledCalendarIdentifiers` 프로퍼티 추가, fetchEvents/fetchReminders/hasEvents에서 비활성화된 캘린더 필터링
5. **ContentView** — SearchView/SettingsView 연결, CalendarSelection 변경 시 EventKitService에 반영","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"d2f2c50b-6e99-435f-89bc-2892afc06ba6","total_cost_usd":1.42569125,"usage":{"input_tokens":39,"cache_creation_input_tokens":48467,"cache_read_input_tokens":1694605,"output_tokens":11011,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":48467,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-6[1m]":{"inputTokens":39,"outputTokens":11011,"cacheReadInputTokens":1694605,"cacheCreationInputTokens":48467,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":1.42569125,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"3e9e3253-9152-4ff2-8793-4ea95b8d449c"}
